description: Welcome to an exceptional way of living at The Residences, Manchester. Our North and West Towers are exclusively for renters. This spacious two-bedroom apartment in West Tower is comprised of an open-plan kitchen-living area with floor-to-ceiling windows that let you soak up the Manchester views. Fully furnished with a sofa, armchair, coffee table, four-seater dining room table, and chairs. The kitchen has a modern kitchen and is integrated with NEFF appliances including an oven with a microwave, CDA water cooler dishwasher, washer/dryer and a wine cooler. Both bedrooms are spacious and carpeted throughout with king-size beds, built-in wardrobes and bedside tables. Every apartment comes with electric heating, a secure fob entry system, and an intercom connected to the Concierge Team with video messaging services. Virgin broadband is included in the rent and cabling has been put in place for BT, Virgin and SKY TV. Located moments from Deansgate Station, Metrolink, and a few minutes walk into the center of the city. 24-hour on-site team offering Dry Cleaning, Dog Walking and Parcel Management. Facilities include sports hall (tennis, football, basketball), 20m swimming pool, sauna & jacuzzi, roof top garden, bookable private dining suites and boardroom. 17th floor, pet friendly, resident events.
